summary: Write tests for shared hooks and extracted utilities
problem_statement: The shared hooks (useStages, useSubStages) and extracted utilities (apiRequest, parseIdParam, logger, constants) are consumed across the application. Without automated tests, regressions in these shared modules silently break every consumer. Tests for these high-leverage modules provide the greatest coverage-to-effort ratio.
in_scope: Write Vitest unit tests for the useStages hook
Write Vitest unit tests for the useSubStages hook
Write Vitest unit tests for the apiRequest wrapper
Write Vitest unit tests for the parseIdParam helper
Write Vitest unit tests for the logger module (level gating, output control)
Write Vitest unit tests for the shared constants module (type and value correctness)
out_of_scope: Integration tests against the storage layer — handled in P7-R2-23
API route tests — handled in P7-R2-24
End-to-end tests — not in R2 scope
requirements: Each shared hook has at least one test covering its primary data-fetching path
Each extracted utility has at least one test covering its primary function
Tests use Vitest and run via npm run test
Tests mock external dependencies (API calls, React Query) appropriately
acceptance_criteria: Automated tests exist for extracted shared logic (hooks and utilities)
All tests pass via npm run test
Tests validate the primary success and error paths for each module
npm run check passes with no new type errors introduced
dependencies: P3-R2-08 — shared hooks must be extracted
P3-R2-09 — apiRequest wrapper must be extracted
P3-R2-10 — shared constants must be extracted
risks: Hooks that depend on React Query or React context require a test wrapper (QueryClientProvider, renderHook) which adds setup complexity
implementation_notes: Use @testing-library/react-hooks or Vitest's renderHook for hook tests. Mock fetch/apiRequest in hook tests. For the apiRequest wrapper itself, mock the global fetch. Co-locate test files alongside source (e.g. useStages.test.ts) or in a __tests__ directory per project convention.
